headline: Here is Why Constellation Energy (CEG) is Among the Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is included among the 12 Best Utility Stocks to Buy Now According to Hedge Funds.
